title: Liquid Client
description: One of the bests clients for minecraft
body:
## Click the heart if you like my work

Welcome to [Liquid Client](https://www.karster.pl/liquidclient)!

Liquid Client is one of the best Minecraft clients.

This client significantly improves Minecraft performance and works 100% on servers.

Here are some of its features:
- Play every server version
- Super Optimizations
- Smooth Animations
- Death Coordinates
- Shulker Box Tooltip
- Dynamic Lights
- Hunger Visualization
- Custom GUI
…and much more!

**Find out more [here](https://www.karster.pl/liquidclient)**

# [**Other projects**](https://sites.google.com/view/s-robotstudio)
